provenance: reference_gait_gen.py 2026-07-09: Drake-IK forward crawl on the 6 lb TARGET walker with 12 Waveshare ST3215-HS servos and improved geometry (stance 400x560mm, yaw lever 160mm, deep-knee 47mm lift). Every frame solved by Drake IK (feet placed + torso level, sea=False — the SEA belt is an actuation detail, not foot placement); crawl order FR,RL,FL,RR, duty 0.80. The IK path is actuator-independent; dynamic tracking must be revalidated after this motor/mass update. IMITATION TARGET: teaches stance poses + the one-foot-up crawl pattern; RL supplies propulsion via velocity tracking + reference-state-init. walker_improved ONLY (yaw/pitch/lift; joint_order names hip_yaw — the env maps it to the SEA rotor).
